name: opentoken-image-gen
description: Generate images via third-party API with interactive quality/ratio selection and batch support.

interface.shortDescription: AI image generation with batch mode, quality & ratio selection.
interface.longDescription: Generate high-quality images using a third-party image generation API. Interactive workflow guides you through quality (1K/2K/4K), aspect ratio (square/landscape/portrait), and batch generation with concurrency control.
interface.defaultPrompt: I want to generate some images
